text: Last class you said: I see your point, but I would argue the opposite.
Today you support that opinion with data: the trend is clear and the numbers are strong.

Elena, how should we open the slide? What number do we highlight first?
Start with the headline: revenue rose sharply to a new peak of forty million.
Good. And the margin? I want to show it improved by three points.
Yes, but we should be honest about the decline in the south, with a clear breakdown by region.
Agreed. And what is your forecast for the next quarter?
If the digital trend continues, I forecast steady growth. That is our recommendation.
Let me highlight the headline number first.
Revenue rose sharply to a peak of forty million.
The margin improved by three points.
Here is the breakdown by region.
My forecast is steady growth, so my recommendation is to invest.

Good morning, everyone. I am Marcus, and I will walk you through our third-quarter results. The headline is simple: revenue rose sharply this quarter. We reached a new peak of forty million dollars, up from thirty-two million last quarter. The main driver was a surge in our digital products. At the same time, our costs fell slightly, so our profit margin improved by three points. Not everything was positive. Sales in the south region declined for the second quarter in a row, and that is a trend we need to watch. Looking ahead, our forecast for the next quarter is cautious but confident. If the digital surge continues, we expect steady growth. I will highlight the regional breakdown on the next slide.

Hi, this is Sofia from the strategy team with a short market update. Overall, the market shows a positive trend this year. Demand for our category surged in the first half, and most analysts forecast continued growth into next year. Let me give you the breakdown. The premium segment is the clear highlight: it reached its highest peak in five years. The budget segment, however, is in slow decline, mainly because of price pressure. Margins across the industry are thin, so every company watches its costs. My recommendation is simple: we follow the trend, we invest in the premium segment, and we protect our margin. I will send the full forecast in the report this afternoon.
